title: Peppery Crisp Malaysian Pistachios Curry
description: A fragrant, low-sodium curry that pairs buttery pistachios with a citrusy kick, delivering a romantic dinner with a satisfying crunch.

ingredients.name: Low-sodium chicken broth
ingredients.notes: use vegetable broth for vegetarian version

instructions: Heat olive oil in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger; cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add red curry paste, crushed red pepper flakes, and brown sugar; cook, stirring, for 2 minutes to release flavor.
Pour in coconut milk and low-sodium broth; bring to a gentle simmer, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Add unsalted roasted pistachios and ground black pepper; gently stir and simmer an additional 5 minutes, ensuring pistachios stay crisp.
Stir in fresh lime juice; taste and adjust seasoning—no added salt needed.
Remove from heat; fold in chopped cilantro for freshness.
Serve hot over steamed jasmine rice or as a side to grilled protein.
Garnish with extra pistachios and lime wedges if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
